2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

3 Noah Trevino

  • Height 5-10
  • Weight 165
  • Year Redshirt Sophomore
  • Hometown Findlay, Ohio
  • High School Liberty-Benton HS
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

2024-25:

Played in 3 games. 

Personal:

Son of Tony and Liz Trevino and has two siblings...majoring in Athletic Administration.

Honors:

All Conference, 4 time conference champion, honor roll.
